title: Universal Tool Hanging Hook Work Light 400 Lumen LED Light with Magnetic Base
description:
If you're a home improvement guru, garage tinkerer or a DIYer, you know how important it is to have good lighting in your workspace. With the Universal Tool Hanging Hook Work Light, you can ensure you'll get the job done right! Our Universal Tool work light features 400 lumens and dual COB LEDs for optimum lighting, even in dark crawlspaces or under the sink. It comes in high-visibility bright orange color and measures 8.5" x 3.5", making it a great size for any workshop, craft room or tight space. It comes with a hanging hook and an integrated rare earth magnet on the base so you can either hang it above you or attach it to metal for a hands-free option, allowing you to focus on your project

Universal Tool Hanging Hook Work Light 400 Lumen LED Light with Magnetic Base

If you're a home improvement guru, garage tinkerer or a DIYer, you know how important it is to have good lighting in your workspace. With the Universal Tool Hanging Hook Work Light, you can ensure you'll get the job done right!

Key Features

  • SUPER BRIGHT LIGHT - 400 Lumens and Dual COB LEDs for Optimum Lighting | Works Great in Dark Crawlspaces, Under the Sink or During Power Outage
  • HANG OR ATTACH TO METAL - Comes with Hanging Hook Option and Integrated Rare Earth Magnet on Base Option for Hands-free Use
  • BRIGHT ORANGE COLOR - High-visibility Neon Orange Color Ideal for Dark Workplaces | Measures 8.5" x 3.5" | Easily Fits in Most Workshops, Craft Rooms, Garages or Tight Spaces
  • BATTERIES INCLUDED - Light Takes 3AA Batteries (Included) | Use Light Right Out of the Box and Get Your Project Started
  • VERSATILE DESIGN - Made of High-quality Plastic Ideal for Indoor or Outdoor Use | Great for Camping, Outdoor Parties, Auto Maintenance or Hobby Crafts

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UTHWRKLMBORG
  • UPC: 855569007836
  • Color: Orange
  • Size: 8.5 in

Our Universal Tool work light features 400 lumens and dual COB LEDs for optimum lighting, even in dark crawlspaces or under the sink. It comes in high-visibility bright orange color and measures 8.5" x 3.5", making it a great size for any workshop, craft room or tight space. It comes with a hanging hook and an integrated rare earth magnet on the base so you can either hang it above you or attach it to metal for a hands-free option, allowing you to focus on your project.

The light has an easy to use on/off switch and has a snap-shut battery compartment to keep the batteries in place during use. The light requires 3AA batteries which we've included so you can get to work right out of the box. In addition to being a workshop essential, these hanging hook magnetic work lights are great for camping, nighttime parties, automotive maintenance or even setting up a dedicated space to create artwork! They'll also come in handy if you find yourself in an emergency and out of power. Make sure you grab a few of these to keep around your house before your next project!
